WHERE bridge_accident_casualty.casualty_severity = '1'
GROUP BY dim_environment.light_conditions
HAVING COUNT(*) > 2 AND COUNT(DISTINCT fact_accident.accident_id) > 1;

question: प्रत्येक क्षेत्रासाठी जेथे अपघात घडला, जर एकापेक्षा जास्त अपघात नोंदवले गेले असतील, तर क्षेत्राचे नाव आणि सरासरी जखमींची संख्या सूचीबद्ध करा, सर्वोच्च सरासरीपासून सर्वनिम्न पर्यंत क्रमवारीत करून.

predicted_sql:
SELECT dim_geography.area_accident_occurred, AVG(fact_accident.number_of_casualties) AS avg_casualties
FROM fact_accident
JOIN dim_geography ON fact_accident.geography_id = dim_geography.geography_id
GROUP BY dim_geography.area_accident_occurred
HAVING COUNT(fact_accident.accident_id) > 1
ORDER BY avg_casualties DESC;
raw_output:

question: ड्रायव्हर्सच्या शीर्ष 5 वय गटांची आणि जखमीच्या गंभीरतेची यादी बनवा ज्यांना सर्वाधिक सरासरी जखमींची संख्या आहे, प्रत्येक गटासाठी वय गट, सरासरी जखमींची संख्या आणि जखमीची गंभीरता दर्शवा.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.AGE_BAND_OF_DRIVER, AVG(T2.NUMBER_OF_CASUALTIES), T3.CASUALTY_SEVERITY FROM DIM_DRIVER AS T1 JOIN FACT_ACCIDENT AS T2 ON T1.DRIVER_ID = T2.DRIVER_ID JOIN BRIDGE_ACCIDENT_CASUALTY AS T3 ON T2.ACCIDENT_ID = T3.ACCIDENT_ID GROUP BY T1.AGE_BAND_OF_DRIVER, T3.CASUALTY_SEVERITY ORDER BY AVG(T2.NUMBER_OF_CASUALTIES) DESC LIMIT 5
predicted_sql:
SELECT 
    d.age_band_of_driver,
    AVG(f.number_of_casualties) AS avg_casualties,
    b.casualty_severity
FROM 
    dim_driver d
JOIN 
    fact_accident f ON d.driver_id = f.driver_id
JOIN 
    bridge_accident_casualty b ON f.accident_id = b.accident_id
GROUP BY 
    d.age_band_of_driver, b.casualty_severity
ORDER BY 
    avg_casualties DESC
LIMIT 5;
raw_output:
SELECT 
    d.age_band_of_driver,
    AVG(f.number_of_casualties) AS avg_casualties,
    b.casualty_severity
FROM 
    dim_driver d
JOIN 
    fact_accident f ON d.driver_id = f.driver_id
JOIN 
    bridge_accident_casualty b ON f.accident_id = b.accident_id
GROUP BY 
    d.age_band_of_driver, b.casualty_severity
ORDER BY 
    avg_casualties DESC
LIMIT 5;

question: ड्राइव्हर आयडी, ड्राइव्हरचे वय गट, ड्राइव्हरचे लिंग आणि प्रत्येक ड्राइव्हरसाठी अपघातांची एकूण संख्या सूचीबद्ध करा, विशेषत: ज्यांचा ड्राइव्हिंग अनुभव 1-2 वर्षे आहे किंवा ज्यांची शैक्षणिक पातळी 'जूनियर हाय स्कूल' आहे, शून्य अपघातांसह ते समाविष्ट करून, आणि परिणाम अपघातांच्या संख्येनुसार उतरत्या क्रमाने क्रमवारीत करा.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.DRIVER_ID, T1.AGE_BAND_OF_DRIVER, T1.SEX_OF_DRIVER, COUNT(T2.ACCIDENT_ID) FROM DIM_DRIVER AS T1 LEFT JOIN FACT_ACCIDENT AS T2 ON T1.DRIVER_ID = T2.DRIVER_ID LEFT JOIN BRIDGE_ACCIDENT_CASUALTY AS T3 ON T2.ACCIDENT_ID = T3.ACCIDENT_ID WHERE T1.DRIVING_EXPERIENCE = '1-2yr' OR T1.EDUCATIONAL_LEVEL = 'Junior high school' GROUP BY T1.DRIVER_ID, T1.AGE_BAND_OF_DRIVER, T1.SEX_OF_DRIVER HAVING COUNT(T2.ACCIDENT_ID) >= 0 ORDER BY COUNT(T2.ACCIDENT_ID) DESC
predicted_sql:
SELECT 
    d.driver_id,
    d.age_band_of_driver,
    d.sex_of_driver,
    COUNT(f.accident_id) AS total_accidents
FROM 
    dim_driver d
LEFT JOIN 
    fact_accident f ON d.driver_id = f.driver_id
WHERE 
    d.driving_experience = '1-2yr' OR d.educational_level = 'Junior high school'
GROUP BY 
    d.driver_id, d.age_band_of_driver, d.sex_of_driver
ORDER BY 
    total_accidents DESC;
raw_output:
SELECT 
    d.driver_id,
    d.age_band_of_driver,
    d.sex_of_driver,
    COUNT(f.accident_id) AS total_accidents
FROM 
    dim_driver d
LEFT JOIN 
    fact_accident f ON d.driver_id = f.driver_id
WHERE 
    d.driving_experience = '1-2yr' OR d.educational_level = 'Junior high school'
GROUP BY 
    d.driver_id, d.age_band_of_driver, d.sex_of_driver
ORDER BY 
    total_accidents DESC;
